query:
SELECT a.id, a.clientId, a.scheduledDate, a.status, a.workTypes, c.name as clientName 
FROM appointments a 
LEFT JOIN clients c ON a.clientId = c.id 
WHERE a.scheduledDate IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY a.scheduledDate DESC 
LIMIT 20;
command:

FROM appointments a 
LEFT JOIN clients c ON a.clientId = c.id
